instruction: Create a program in Python using pygame library to build a simple game
output:
import pygame
 
BLACK = (0, 0, 0)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)
 
pygame.init()
 
screen = pygame.display.set_mode([800, 600])
 
pygame.display.set_caption('My Game')
 
clock = pygame.time.Clock()
 
background_position = [0, 0]
 
background_image = pygame.image.load("image.jpg").convert()
 
player_image = pygame.image.load("player.jpg").convert()
player_position = [100,100]
 
done = False
 
while not done:
    for event in pygame.event.get():
        if event.type == pygame.QUIT:
            done = True
 
    screen.fill(WHITE)
 
    screen.blit(background_image, background_position)
 
    screen.blit(player_image, player_position)
 
    pygame.display.flip()
 
    clock.tick(60)
 
pygame.quit()
